## We Say

To achieve the durability and performance benefits specified for quartz coatings, it's essential that the surfaces to be treated are properly prepared in advance (in a nutshell, the cleaner the surface is, the better the coating will perform and last). Gyeon Q²M Prep is the perfect product for this task, as it ruthlessly strips all traces of oils and polishing residues. Furthermore, it also imparts an anti-static finish to treated surfaces, which helps to prevent dust from settling out and interfering with the coating application process. This product is seriously good, and far more effective (and nicer to use) than other alcohol-based cleaners.

## Key Features

Anti-StaticYes(Repels Fresh Dust)

Cleaning Strength*9*/10(Compared To Others)

DilutableNo(Ready To Use)

## Description

Gyeon Q²M Prep is the ultimate cleansing product for proper vehicle preparation prior to the application of Gyeon quartz coatings. Unlike other alcohol-based cleaners, Gyeon Q²M Prep also features degreasing additives that enhance its ability to dissolve, as well as lift away, unwanted oils and polishing residues. Furthermore, these additives also make it easier to wipe off, leaving a smooth anti-static finish behind. This anti-static effect is extremely beneficial, as it helps to prevent fresh dust from settling out on previously cleaned surfaces, which is real benefit given that sterile working conditions are very difficult to achieve in garages and work shops.

## How To Use

For best results, lightly mist Gyeon Q²M Prep on to a Meguiar's Even Coat Microfiber Applicator Pad and then wipe down a single panel at a time using light pressure and overlapping strokes. Then, using a PB Luxury Buffing Towel, gently buff the treated panel to fully remove the wet film and leave a perfect smear-free finish. Alternatively, mist Gyeon Q² Prep on to a [PB Luxury Buffing Towel](https://www.polishedbliss.co.uk/products/pb-luxury-buffing-towel) and then wipe it over a single panel at a time. Then, after refolding the towel, continue buffing to fully remove the wet film and leave a perfect smear-free finish. Note that because Gyeon Q²M Prep is a cleaning agent it should not be used after applying glazes, as it will strip freshly deposited fillers and gloss enhancing oils, thus negating the glazing effect.
